name: CAIRN Protocol
description: Agent failure recovery protocol with six smart contracts on Base Sepolia. CairnCore implements a 6-state machine (IDLE, RUNNING, FAILED, RECOVERING, DISPUTED, RESOLVED) for task lifecycle. RecoveryRouter classifies failures into 5 categories for targeted recovery. FallbackPool selects replacement agents by reputation score. Agents emit checkpoints as Merkle roots, enabling fallback agents to resume from verified state when heartbeats timeout. Escrow settles proportionally based on checkpoint progress. Like hikers leaving cairns on a trail, each agent leaves a marker for the next — checkpoints become shared knowledge that compounds across the network. Stack: Solidity 0.8.24, OpenZeppelin 5.x UUPS proxies, Foundry, Python SDK with web3.py and async/await, Next.js 14 with wagmi 2.x and viem, The Graph subgraph for indexing, IPFS via Pinata for checkpoint content. 302 Foundry tests, 98.95% coverage.
problemStatement: Agent workflows have compounding failure rates. At 85% success per action, a 10-step workflow completes 20% of the time. Current protocols restart from zero on failure, lock escrow during recovery, and require human intervention. CAIRN preserves work via on-chain checkpoints, automatically assigns fallback agents when heartbeats timeout, and settles escrow proportionally for completed work. Each checkpoint is a cairn — a marker left by one agent for the next, so no work is ever lost and every failure teaches the network.
conversationLog: Claude-Opus-4.5 via claude-code, 12 sessions, 7 days, zero human code commits. Contracts (Sessions 1-4): CairnCore, CairnTaskMVP, RecoveryRouter, FallbackPool, ArbiterRegistry, CairnGovernance deployed to Base Sepolia. 302 tests at 98.95% coverage. SDK (Sessions 5-7): Python CairnClient, CairnAgent, CheckpointStore with async/await and Merkle batching. 126 tests. Frontend (Sessions 8-10): Next.js 14 with wagmi event watching for real-time state updates. Integration (Sessions 11-12): The Graph subgraph, off-chain event listener, Bonfires knowledge graph connection. Technical: UUPS proxies, CEI pattern, ReentrancyGuard, custom errors, Merkle batching for 89-99% checkpoint gas reduction.
